name: GindaChen
description: Plugins from GindaChen — GPU performance analysis and profiling tools for NVIDIA Nsight Systems.

plugins.name: nsys-ai
plugins.description: GPU profile analysis for NVIDIA Nsight Systems. Triage bottlenecks, diagnose NCCL, compute MFU, compare regressions, and drill into SASS instructions. Requires the nsys-ai CLI (>= 0.2.1): pip install nsys-ai.
